'stage2_dropper.py' : 'malware_loader.js'; const obfChip = lth.obfChip; const obfColor = lth.accentText; const obfBg = lth.accentDim; const obfBorder = lth.accent + '55'; return (

:
} {fileName} 51.2 KB {obfChip}

getLangTheme:
function getLangTheme(lang) {
  if (lang === 'py') return {
    // accent
    accent:      '#5b9fd4',
    accentDim:   '#0a1a2a',
    accentText:  '#8dc4f0',
    accentBorder:'#5b9fd444',
    label:       'py',
    obfChip:     'pyarmor',
    // tinted backgrounds
    headerBg:    '#0a1520',
    footerBg:    '#080f18',
    sidebarBg:   '#0c1820',
    borderTint:  '#1a3040',
    border2Tint: '#244060',
    // log colours
    logInfo:     '#8dc4f0',
    logOk:       '#a0e0ff',
    logDebug:    '#4a7a9a',
    logOrange:   '#5b9fd4',
    logArrow:    '#3a7aaa',
    // code keyword
    codeKeyword: '#5b9fd4',
    codeString:  '#a8d4a8',
    codeNumber:  '#d4a85b',
    codeIdent:   '#c8d8e8',
    codeWarn:    '#d46a6a',
    codeComment: '#4a7a8a',
    // status bar
    statusAccent:'#5b9fd4',
  };
  if (lang === 'js') return {
    // accent
    accent:      '#c9a742',
    accentDim:   '#201a00',
    accentText:  '#e8c660',
    accentBorder:'#c9a74244',
    label:       'js',
    obfChip:     'js-obfuscator',
    // tinted backgrounds
    headerBg:    '#181400',
    footerBg:    '#120f00',
    sidebarBg:   '#161200',
    borderTint:  '#302400',
    border2Tint: '#483600',
    // log colours
    logInfo:     '#c9a742',
    logOk:       '#f0d870',
    logDebug:    '#7a6a30',
    logOrange:   '#d4843f',
    logArrow:    '#8a7040',
    // code keyword
    codeKeyword: '#c9a742',
    codeString:  '#cc9e78',
    codeNumber:  '#a8c97a',
    codeIdent:   '#e0d4a8',
    codeWarn:    '#d46a6a',
    codeComment: '#7a8a4a',
    // status bar
    statusAccent:'#c9a742',
  };
  // upload / unknown — neutral purple
  return {
    accent:      C.accent,
    accentDim:   C.accentDim,
    accentText:  C.accentText,
    accentBorder:C.accent + '44',
    label:       '?',
    obfChip:     'detecting…',
    headerBg:    C.bg1,
    footerBg:    C.bg1,
    sidebarBg:   C.bg1,
    borderTint:  C.border,
    border2Tint: C.border2,
    logInfo:     '#8abcf0',
    logOk:       '#ffffff',
    logDebug:    '#909090',
    logOrange:   C.orange,
    logArrow:    '#6a8aaa',
    codeKeyword: '#8ab8d8',
    codeString:  '#cc9e78',
    codeNumber:  '#aabe8a',
    codeIdent:   '#c8c8c0',
    codeWarn:    '#d46a6a',
    codeComment: '#7ab568',
    statusAccent:C.accentText,
  };
}
